synopsis:
Star Wars Adventures 8 is the eighth issue of the Star Wars Adventures (2020) comic series. The comic is written by Sam Maggs and Danny Lore, illustrated by Liana Kangas and Arianna Florean, and released by IDW Publishing.
The Empire has been defeated, but that doesn't mean that the danger is over for Luke and Leia, who find themselves in a tricky situation that they have to work together to get out of! Plus, Count Dooku has sinister plans for a Clone troop!
title: Star Wars Adventures (2020) #08 - Trade Relations
